prompt: Vertical editorial photograph of a cluttered real-life clothes rail packed densely with garments, sleeves and hems tangled, a couple of pieces slipping off their hangers. Restrained lived-in palette: oat, cream, taupe, dusty pink, faded denim blue and soft prints, with colour kept gentle and slightly desaturated rather than bright. One small soft pile of a few clothes on the floor. Soft window daylight, natural realistic tone, an everyday cluttered wardrobe feel. Candid documentary photography, rich fabric texture, no big blocks of pure red, no text, no logos, no faces.
